name: Grade 1 Gardening — Semester 2
description: An 18-week Grade 1 pathway for pollinators, food webs, harvest, seasonal planning, and stewardship. Learning builds independence through investigation, guided practice, application, and reflection.
learningGoals: Develop first-grade knowledge and skills in pollinators, food webs, harvest, seasonal planning, and stewardship.
Use speaking, drawing, writing, numbers, models, or movement to explain thinking.
Work independently when ready and ask for help, feedback, or clarification when needed.

lessons.title: Explore pollinators, food webs, harvest, seasonal planning, and stewardship
lessons.objective: I can observe, discuss, and record pollinators, food webs, harvest, seasonal planning, and stewardship by completing a first-grade task and explaining one observation, choice, or strategy.

lessons.title: Practice pollinators, food webs, harvest, seasonal planning, and stewardship
lessons.objective: I can observe, discuss, and record pollinators, food webs, harvest, seasonal planning, and stewardship by completing a first-grade task and explaining one observation, choice, or strategy.

units.title: Investigate: pollinators, food webs, harvest, seasonal planning, and stewardship
units.essentialQuestion: What evidence can we gather about pollinators, food webs, harvest, seasonal planning, and stewardship?
outcomes: I can observe, discuss, and record pollinators, food webs, harvest, seasonal planning, and stewardship.
I can use accurate words, pictures, numbers, models, writing, or movement to communicate my thinking.

lessons.title: Explore pollinators, food webs, harvest, seasonal planning, and stewardship
lessons.objective: I can observe, discuss, and record pollinators, food webs, harvest, seasonal planning, and stewardship by completing a first-grade task and explaining one observation, choice, or strategy.

activities.title: Notice and investigate
activities.learnerAction: The learner uses age-appropriate materials and first-grade vocabulary to observe, discuss, and record pollinators, food webs, harvest, seasonal planning, and stewardship. Adult supervision is provided whenever the subject involves tools, heat, animals, water, traffic, or online media.

successCriteria: The learner completes a first-grade task connected to pollinators, food webs, harvest, seasonal planning, and stewardship.
The learner explains an observation, choice, or strategy with appropriate support.
The learner follows safety, care, and collaboration expectations.
